exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your investing finance forward
items: Calculate your current net worth by listing all assets and debts
Open a high-yield savings account and set it up for automatic transfers
Research and compare 3 different types of investment accounts (401k, IRA, taxable brokerage)
Set your first investment goal and determine the exact dollar amount needed
Read one investment book or take an online course to learn basic investment principles
Complete a risk tolerance questionnaire and document your investment comfort level
